problem id: 58b650e5
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(2) XOR NOT SHL(3)) AND ROT(2)

examples:
  00000100 -> 00000000
  01000110 -> 00010001
  11100001 -> 00000011
  11011010 -> 01000011
  11001011 -> 00001011
  11010011 -> 00001011
  11001010 -> 00000011
  00101000 -> 00000000
  11110100 -> 10000011

query: 00100000
predicted answer: 00000000
